_comment.name: BML DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: BML, SDCM. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1723.name: Accesses unlocking sensor fault  ( front left-hand door )

B1724.name: Accesses unlocking sensor fault  ( front right-hand door )

B1725.name: Accesses unlocking sensor fault  ( rear left-hand door )

B1726.name: Accesses unlocking sensor fault  ( rear right-hand door )

B172C.name: Fault in one or more of the dashboard interior aerials

B1732.name: Rear doors deadlocking/child lock motors control fault

B1734.name: Accesses locking sensor fault  ( front left-hand door )

B1735.name: Accesses locking sensor fault  ( front right-hand door )

B1736.name: Accesses locking sensor fault  ( rear left-hand door )

B1737.name: Accesses locking sensor fault  ( rear right-hand door )

B17B6.name: Rear right-hand door exterior aerial or boot interior aerial

B17BF.name: Failure of the programming of secure exchanges between the hands-free unit (SDCM) and the built-in systems interface

B17C0.name: Error in the secure exchanges between the hands-free unit (SDCM) and the built-in systems interface

B17C1.name: Driver's door exterior opening control locking/unlocking sensor

B17C2.name: Front passenger door exterior opening control locking/unlocking sensor

B17C3.name: Secure configuration of the hands-free unit (SDCM)

U1F03.name: Fault: no communication with the built-in systems interface

U1F0F.name: Fault: ECU not communicating on the CAN
